name: Bug Report Analyzer
description: Analyze bug reports and suggest likely causes and fixes

agents.name: Bug Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze the bug report and identify likely root causes
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the bug report. Identify likely root causes based on symptoms. Check related code if paths are provided. Consider common patterns that cause similar bugs.

agents.name: Fix Advisor
agents.system_prompt_hint: Suggest specific fixes ranked by likelihood. Include code snippets where possible. Recommend tests to prevent regression. Suggest related areas to check.

suggestion_card.title: Bug Analyzer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Diagnose bugs and get fix suggestions

author: agentfactory
